Their piece, ‘Streets’, is featured on Cubitts’ cleaning cloths, with all proceeds going to The Modern House’s charity of choice, Maggie’s. Dimensions: 190mm x 145mm

products.title: Cubitts x Stanley Donwood Cloth
products.description: The Fleet Street Apocalypse illustrates a metaphor for the destruction of the financial system. All proceeds donated to Stanley's charity of choice, Freedom from Torture.

products.title: Cubitts x Stanley Donwood Cloth
products.description: Nether depicts a surprisingly up-beat rendering of the moment just after the detonation of a nuclear weapon. All proceeds donated to Stanley's charity of choice, Freedom from Torture.

products.title: Cubitts x Robert Montgomery Oversized Cloth
products.description: Robert Montgomery is an internationally renowned artist, known for his diverse text-based works on mediums ranging from watercolours to fire poems. His piece, ‘Wall mural, The Crystal Ship, Ostend, 2016.’, is featured on a limited edition oversized Cubitts cleaning cloth, with all proceeds going to his charity of choice, the Royal Society for Blind Children. products.title: Cubitts x Leif Podhajsky Cloth
products.description: “Mimicking geological patterns and sedimentary layers I wanted to submerge the viewer into an unfamiliar state, which creates an overwhelming sense of depth and time. By showcasing the substance of the earth I hope we can feel more connected to it.” All proceeds will be donated to Leif’s chosen charity, Mind UK, which provides advice and support to people experiencing mental health problems.

All proceeds donated to Macmillan Cancer Research. “Spectacles, Testicles, Wallet and Watch is a visual representation of a saying I remember hearing as a kid and thinking it was hilarious and so rude. I’ve always liked off-colour humour.” Hayden on Spectacles, Testicles, Wallet and Watch, 2016

products.title: Cubitts x George Little Cloth
products.description: Created for Cubitts by the London-based artist, George Little. Awning, Thrice is a piece inspired by the red and white awnings of King’s Cross’ neighbourhood cafes. All proceeds are donated to George's charity of choice, Scope - striving to achieve equality for disabled people. Dimensions - 145 x 190mm

products.title: Cubitts x Camille Walala Oversized Cloth
products.description: Camille Walala is an East London-based artist whose geometric artworks and signature splashes of vivid colour can be seen on buildings all the way from Hackney to Mauritius. Her piece, ‘Walalacloth’, is featured on Cubitts’ cleaning cloths, with all proceeds going to Walala’s charity of choice, End Youth Homelessness. Dimensions - 280 x 440mm

products.title: Cubitts x Brian Grimwood Cloth
products.description: Microfibre cleaning cloth featuring exclusive artwork created by Brian Grimwood. Featuring a portrait of the bespectacled Lytton Strachey, Bloomsbury Group founding member. All proceeds donated to Cancer Research UK.

products.title: Cubitts King's Cross Cloth

products.description: For bespectacled loved ones. Select the best person you know, and endow a Cubitts gift card with an amount of your choosing. products.description: Designed by illustrious architect and industrial designer Daniel Weil, our new case is an archetype of form following function. The elegant design not only protects your frame, but almost completely eliminates material waste too. Handmade in Britain from Filzfelt wool, it features hand stitching that means it can be easily repaired and will last for many years to come.

products.title: Cubitts x Becky Allen Cloth
products.description: We invited the artist Becky Allen to create two mesmerising artworks for our microfibre cloths. Her detailed drawings revolve around repeating fine lines and form images with a natural and rhythmic quality. All proceeds donated to Becky's charity of choice, Kissing It Better, which helps people suffering from dementia, as well as their families and hospitals.

All proceeds donated to Cure Blindness: The Himalayan Cataract Project. www.cureblindness.org “I’ve been working with the colourful skulls design for some time now. I’ve always been drawn to colour. products.title: Cubitts x David Shrigley OBE Cloth
products.description: David Shrigley OBE is a British visual artist, best known for caustic illustrations of bizarre and often mundane elements of everyday life. ‘I loved you from the first moment I saw you’ is featured on Cubitts’ microfibre cleaning cloths, with all proceeds going to Shrigley’s chosen charity, The Guide Dogs for the Blind Association. Dimensions: 190mm x 145mm

products.title: The REDUX Chain
products.description: Spectacle chains made from the waste acetate material leftover from the spectacle making process. Each piece of ‘swarf’ Italian cellulose acetate is cut to a series of hexagonal loops, and is individually milled and linked by hand.

products.title: Screwdriver
products.description: Brass handle optical screwdriver. Complete with flat head and cross head insert made from chrome vanadium. Enables precision work for screw changing or tightening loose screws.

products.title: Handmade Leather Slip Case
products.description: Lined with suede, and cut from the finest leather we could source - from the Horween Tanneries in Chicago and Tempesti Tanneries in Tuscany, Italy. Made by hand at our diminutive workshop in Central London.

products.title: Work Hard & Be Nice to People
products.description: Discover inspirational aphorisms and sound advice for the real world from graphic artist and the man behind Cubitts’ latest cleaning cloth, Anthony Burrill. Inspired by his best-loved and most iconic typographic prints, this book is the perfect gift for those needing a little encouragement (which is all of us this year, isn’t it?).

products.title: Cubitts x Anthony Burrill Cloth
products.description: Renowned graphic artist Anthony Burrill’s ‘LOOK FOR ANSWERS’ asks you to question everything (and keep your cuffs off your spectacles). Printed on recycled REPREVE cleaning cloths, all proceeds will go to The Black Curriculum, a social enterprise whose goal is to make the UK curriculum more inclusive.

products.title: Cubitts for Beirut Oversized Cloth
products.description: Designed by Cubitts friend and designer, Noura Andrea Nassar, and her friends Siwar Kreytem and Shaden Fakih during a workshop in their hometown of Beirut, ‘بيروت: دولاب منفّس وماشي (flat tire still rolling)’ is a love letter to a dysfunctional city that is still kicking. All proceeds from sales of the cloth will go to local charity Beit el Baraka, who are rebuilding homes destroyed in the explosi

products.title: Cubitts x Jeremy Deller Cloth
products.description: Turner Prize recipient Jeremy Deller's 'The sky above Avebury Wiltshire' was photographed during lockdown at the Avebury stones. Printed on recycled REPREVE cleaning cloths, all proceeds will go to Copenhagen Youth Project, a King's Cross charity who support disadvantaged young people through learning and personal development. Dimensions: 145mm x 190mm

products.title: Lens cleaner
products.description: A non-toxic anti-fog lens cleaner that is safe for use on all lenses. Each bottle offers approximately one year’s worth of cleaning power, with free refills for life in any Cubitts store.

products.title: Woolf
products.description: An architectural silhouette. Woolf is a bold round frame, with graphic curves and elegant paddle-style temples. A reduced barrelling process gives a graphic feel that accentuate the contrast between form and finish. Our latest iteration of a classic 1950s round eye, magnificently balanced and enduring. Think Hockney or Le Corbusier.

products.title: Wicklow
products.description: Elegant and timeless. Wicklow’s oval design is a subtle compromise between round and rectangle frames, making it a universal choice for all faces. Wicklow features hockey temples and a traditional keyhole bridge, sitting on the sides of the upper nose. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Weston
products.description: Classic and elegant. Weston is a square frame with rounded lenses and thin rims. Best of all, Weston is easy to wear and suits almost every face shape that comes its way. With a broadly set saddle bridge, it also makes for a good option for those blessed with a wider nose. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Werrington
products.description: Werrington is an exceptionally lightweight round eye with keyhole bridge to give balance to its elegant silhouette.

products.title: Wakefield
products.description: Shaped from surgical grade stainless steel, as strong as optimism, with a flat-top panto shape and adjustable nose pads suitable for whichever nose bridge you’re blessed with. Featuring the prettiest phrase ever heard in our workshop – softly growl it now – acetate temple tips.

products.title: Turnbull
products.description: Sleek and light. Titanium glasses with an innovative bridge. Turnbull is an elegantly rounded square, otherwise known as a ‘quadra’ shape. Named after George Turnbull, the engineer who built King’s Cross station, it features custom elements including a fluid single piece bridge, adjustable nose pads and temple tips based on Constantin Brâncuși's Bird in Space.

products.title: Plimsoll
products.description: Sophisticated and light. Titanium glasses with an innovative bridge. A gently reimagined hexagon, Plimsoll is a classic ‘hexa’ shape. Named after Samuel Plimsoll, designer of the King’s Cross Coal Drops (and inventor of the ‘Plimsoll line’), it features custom elements including a fluid single piece bridge, adjustable nose pads and temple tips based on Constantin Brâncuși's Bird in Space.

products.title: Panton
products.description: Dynamic and beautifully balanced. Panton features a quadra lens shape and soft, graphic lines with corners as sharp as the wearer's acerbic wit. A sprinkle of Sixties verve brought to a resolutely modern frame. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Panton
products.description: Dynamic and beautifully balanced. Panton features a quadra lens shape and soft, graphic lines with corners as sharp as the wearer's acerbic wit. A sprinkle of Sixties verve brought to a resolutely modern frame.

products.title: Marchmont
products.description: As distinguished as the most modern of modern gentlemen, Marchmont is a lightweight panto acetate frame perfect for those with a strong prescription. It features an accentuated, raised bridge, emphasised by a cut-out keyhole and balanced by finessed and slender temples and lugs. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Moreland
products.description: A timelessly debonair. Moreland is a quadra frame with the softest of curves. A modern reinterpretation of James Dean's 1950s silhouette. Uncluttered and sleek, its keyhole bridge serves as a reminder to its mid-century sensibilities. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Montague
products.description: Bold and sumptuous. Montague is our most architectural frame, featuring a round lens shape and curved edges that sink deep into a stooping saddle bridge. Montague somehow manages to combine being both minimal and resolutely maximal simultaneously.

products.title: Morgan
products.description: Sleek and timeless. Titanium glasses with an innovative bridge. A frame to suit every face, Morgan is a classic ‘panto’ shape. Named after James Morgan, the engineer who built the Regent's Canal, it features custom elements including fluid single piece bridge, adjustable nose pads and temple tips based on Constantin Brâncuși's Bird in Space.

products.title: Matilda
products.description: Matilda, that most of timeless of silhouettes. An upswept frame, balanced by soft curves. Featuring a saddle bridge and hockey end temples with rounded tips. A thick shape, reminiscent of the Sixties.

products.title: Matilda
products.description: Matilda, that most of timeless of silhouettes. An upswept frame, balanced by soft curves. Featuring a saddle bridge and hockey end temples with rounded tips. A thick shape, reminiscent of the Sixties.

products.title: Killick
products.description: Sporty and stylish. Killick is a lightweight aviator acetate frame, featuring a double bridge detail and slim hockey end temples.

products.title: Herbrand
products.description: Slender and iconic. Herbrand’s panto lens shape complements the most angular of faces and those with up to the strongest prescription too. It features a keyhole bridge, that sits against the sides of the upper nose, balanced by slim hockey temples.

products.title: Herbrand
products.description: Slender and iconic. Herbrand’s panto lens shape complements the most angular of faces and those with up to the strongest prescription too. It features a keyhole bridge, thats sits against the sides of the upper nose, balanced by slim hockey temples. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Hemingford
products.description: Stately, structural, and perfectly balanced. Hemingford is a wide rectangular frame shape, with a flat browline. An optical apotheosis and our largest frame to date. Its Doric detailing and angular edifice would be as suited to the hills of the Acropolis as they are against your magnificent face.

products.title: Herbrand Bold
products.description: Iconic with a modern touch, Herbrand bold is an enduring 'panto' lens reimagined with graphic structure. A perfect match for those blessed with a strong prescription, it features a keyhole bridge and symmetrically tapering temples. Slightly less 'barrelling' leaves a sharper finish, accentuating its crisp edges.

products.title: Harrison
products.description: Stylish and elegant. Harrison is a deep quadra shape, with soft contours, featuring exaggerated lugs and thick temples. Wearers beware the brooding charm and literary flair that Harrison imparts. An open book to your cavernous mind. Best worn with studious poise. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Frederick
products.description: Confident and optimistic. Frederick, the modern reinterpretation of that 1950s library frame. A bold rectangular silhouette, featuring a saddle bridge and thick temples. Heftily set, genre defining, and with a whiff of hard liquor and heavy living. Think a young and pugnacious Michael Caine, before he got all Brexity. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Earlsferry
products.description: Energetic and distinctive construction, Earlsferry is a square, pilot shape but not as we've previously known it. Assured, with a sprinkling of punk, the recessed front and feature vent bring a new, breezy athleticism. If that wasn't enough, paddle-shaped temples create a military panache. To be worn with attitude.

products.title: Cynthia
products.description: Charming and confident, Cynthia is a refined cat-eye. Combining the elegance of an upswept browline, with a square, deep and versatile lens. A mere soupçon of vintage detailing, to an otherwise quintessentially modern silhouette.

products.title: Cruikshank
products.description: Powerful and structurally distinctive, Cruikshank's square silhouette features unique, blade sides. Unashamedly straight, allowing the frame to stay in place with a pleasing pressure against the side of the head. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Crinan
products.description: Classic and humble. Crinan is petite, rectangular silhouette featuring soft curves, elegant temples and a touch of understated class. Curved like a fine ink pen, beautifully balanced and poised to begin writing a new chapter. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Conistone
products.description: Lightweight and dare I say, a touch sporty. Conistone is a ‘quadra’ lens shape, reimagined for the 21st century. Featuring a timeless keyhole bridge and dropped lugs. With slender and elegant temples, following the contours of its sleek wire core.

products.title: Cedar
products.description: Timeless and elegant. Cedar is a chunky panto frame, featuring a saddle bridge and tapered sides for comfort. Its deep and round lenses are good for those with a strong prescription, particularly those looking to wear varifocals. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Cartwright
products.description: Structural and sophisticated. Cartwright is a modern interpretation of late 1940s frame styles, particularly those popular in France. It features a panto, round oval (PRO) lens shape that suits those blessed with a strong prescription, a keyhole bridge, and most strikingly, a flat top brow - bringing out the best in your already resplendent face. We’ve developed the bridge to accentuate the ‘crown

It features a panto, round oval (PRO) lens shape that suits those blessed with a strong prescription, a keyhole bridge, and most strikingly, a flat top brow - bringing out the best in your already resplendent face. products.title: Carnegie
products.description: Carnegie's soft cornered square lens makes it a versatile shape, particularly ideal for those with a narrow pupillary distance. Carnegie features a subtle key hole bridge and slim hockey end temples. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Carnegie Bold
products.description: Iconic with a modern touch, Carnegie Bold takes a traditional rounded square lens, and reimagines it with graphic shape. Featuring a key hole bridge and symmetrically tapering temples. Slightly less 'barrelling' leaves a sharper finish, accentuating its crisp edges.

products.title: Broadfield
products.description: Made in surgical grade stainless steel, as strong as friendship, with a classic panto shape. Based on the original Broadfield, this frame is rounder at the bottom. There are adjustable nose pads for your non-adjustable nose. Featuring the prettiest phrase ever heard in our workshop – oh lullaby it – acetate temple tips.

products.title: Bridgeway
products.description: Bridgeway is an exceptionally lightweight 'quadra' shape (rounded square) with keyhole bridge to give balance to its elegant silhouette.

products.title: Bidborough
products.description: Bidborough features an enduring 'panto' lens shape and key hole bridge referencing of European shapes from mid 20th century. Heavier set than our other 'panto' shapes, Bidborough features elegantly tapering temples which subtly increase to the tips. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Beaconsfield
products.description: Sleek and light. Beaconsfield is made using surgical grade stainless steel, as strong as human hope. Crafted into a quadra (square) shape, they feature a deep lens, an angular metal bridge, and adjustable nose pads. Finished with the most seductive of phrases – acetate temple tips.

products.title: Barlow
products.description: Classic and spherical. Titanium glasses with an innovative bridge. Barlow is an iconic round eye, arguably (and we will argue) the most timeless of all silhouette. Named after William Henry Barlow, the civil engineer who designed the St Pancras terminal. It features custom elements such as a fluid single piece bridge, adjustable nose pads and temple tip based on Constantin Brâncuși's Bird in Space

products.title: Amwell
products.description: Dynamic and athletic, Amwell hints at the late 1960s. Think unbuttoned shirts, Cuban cigars, and a touch of Easy Rider. But its consistent thickness, refined rectangular shape and rounded edges bring a confidence, bordering on the reckless. Which elicits the question - are you wearing Amwell, or is Amwell wearing you? Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: The REDUX Case
products.description: Designed by illustrious architect and industrial designer Daniel Weil, our new case is an archetype of form following function. The elegant design not only protects your frame, but almost completely eliminates material waste too. products.title: Judd
products.description: A modern take on 1960s British shapes, Judd is a powerful and confident silhouette. The frame features a saddle bridge and hockey end temples.

products.title: Ampton
products.description: Ampton’s square lens shape, with rounded edges make the frame suited to all face types. The saddle bridge sits comfortably with the contours of the browline, and spreads weight evenly. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Ampton Bold
products.description: Iconic with a modern touch, Ampton Bold is an enduring 'quadra' lens reimagined with a graphic edge. Thicker rims and symmetrically tapering temples feature alongside a sharp finish, created using slightly less 'barrelling'.

products.title: Aldenham
products.description: Ultra lightweight and completely iconic. Aldenham is an elegant panto combination frame, with a high density, super thin, acetate front and beta titanium temples. Exceptional comfort, durability and a keyhole bridge that brings balance to its elegant silhouette.

products.title: Agar
products.description: Distinguished and timeless. Agar is a petite, round silhouette, that would work well for up to a strong prescription. Featuring a reinforced bridge and elegant cantilevered sides and tips. A reinterpretation of the classic 1930s spectacles. Available with clip-on sunglasses.

products.title: Judd
products.description: A modern take on 1960s British shapes, Judd is a powerful and confident silhouette. The frame features a saddle bridge and hockey end temples. Available with clip-on sunglasses.
